title: Hell Fire and Brimstone
description: Makes your explosions... slightly more Firey I guess?
body:
You know how explosions in MC are white-gray? Isn't that kind of... weird? Explosions irl are **VERY** fiery! Not... weird white shockwaves.

Well... with this subpar resource pack straight off the abandoned (_trust pls_) production lines of the FFI, you can make them... yellow-orange.


_Why would you want this?_ IDUNNO.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/6U5ONpreIbM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
